name: Super hero hook
description: Become the Super Hero in this new open-world adventure full run, swing and non-stop action. The world is under threat from city-wide and Super Heroes can stop it! Standing in his way are Robots, the Goblin. Can you help Hero restore order and safety to your friend Welcome to Stickman Superhero Hook - Super Stick Heroes Swing! Play as the stickman superheroes and flip like a spider against the dark forces in the universe and protect yourself.
